name: Gateway Recreation Center
description: Gateway Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Ketchikan, AK. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, and food.

name: Ketchikan High School
description: Come play pickleball at Ketchikan High School in Ketchikan, AK! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
